message:
feat: Add exception message tracking and catch-all handlers

- Add thread-local storage for exception messages in exceptions.zig
- Exception variables (as name in except blocks) now properly hoisted
- Exception/BaseException handlers now work as catch-all (catch any error)
- pyToInt now sets proper Python-style error messages
- Map Zig string types to Python 'str' in error messages

Fixes test_bool.py test_sane_len which tests exception message equality.
